summary: Update mode testing complete. Verified major visual overhaul: GM Screen has black-to-purple gradient background with purple accents, Character Sheet has black-to-blue/cyan gradient with cyan accents, 3D Dice Roller has dark blurred background with subtle glow, Player section is now accessible (Coming Soon overlay removed), Live Session Mode floating panel removed (merged into GM Screen). All 26 tests passed (1 skipped - Live Session toggle removed as expected).

gm_screen_purple_gradient.title: GM Screen displays with black-to-purple gradient background
gm_screen_purple_gradient.details: GM Screen has black at top fading to purple at bottom, with purple accents on all tabs and buttons
gm_screen_purple_gradient.evidence: Tests 'GM Screen displays with black-to-purple gradient background' and 'GM Screen has purple accents on all buttons and tabs' passed

3d_dice_roller_dark_blur.title: 3D Dice Roller has dark blurred background with subtle glow
3d_dice_roller_dark_blur.details: 3D Dice Roller overlay has dark blurred background (rgba(0,0,0,0.85)) with purple glow on GM pages
3d_dice_roller_dark_blur.evidence: Tests '3D Dice Roller has dark blurred background with subtle glow' and '3D Dice Roller shows purple glow on GM pages' passed

player_section_accessible.title: Player section on dashboard is now accessible (no Coming Soon overlay)
player_section_accessible.details: Player section shows 'PLAYER SIDE' header with 'New Character' button that is clickable and functional
player_section_accessible.evidence: Tests 'Player section on dashboard is now accessible' and 'Character cards are clickable and navigate to character sheet' passed

character_sheet_cyan_gradient.title: Character Sheet displays with black-to-blue/cyan gradient background
character_sheet_cyan_gradient.details: Character Sheet has black at top fading to blue/cyan at bottom, with cyan accents on buttons and headers
character_sheet_cyan_gradient.evidence: Tests 'Character Sheet displays with black-to-blue/cyan gradient background' and 'Character Sheet has cyan accents' passed

navigation_works.title: All navigation works correctly between GM and Player pages
navigation_works.details: Navigation between Dashboard, GM Screen, and Character Sheet works correctly
navigation_works.evidence: Test 'Navigation works correctly between GM and Player pages' passed

live_session_mode_removed.title: Live Session Mode merged into GM Screen (floating panel removed)
live_session_mode_removed.details: The floating Live Session Mode toggle button was removed as expected - functionality merged into GM Screen
live_session_mode_removed.evidence: Test 'Live Session Mode toggle button is visible' skipped as expected (feature removed)

test_results.backend: N/A - no backend changes in this update
